name: TBC169 synbiotic chronic constipation trial in middle-aged and elderly adults
summary: Randomized double-blind controlled clinical trial testing a Heyndrickxia coagulans TBC169 synbiotic plus dietary-fiber components versus dietary fiber alone in middle-aged and elderly adults with chronic constipation.
population: 140 participants aged at least 45 years with chronic constipation

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Microbiome Composition Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes function, biomarkers, and safety in 140 participants aged at least 45 years with chronic constipation. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
